artPrompt: A toxic neighborhood sealed off, sagging blank-striped hazard tape strung between rusted lamp-posts, withered husks of creatures slumped beyond it while one sludge-glowing mutant survives within, bubbling green runoff and drifting litter under a bruised stormy sky, mutant overgrowth swallowing the fences, a tender desolate containment, rendered as soft pastel impressionism — hazy diffuse light, visible chalky texture, gentle gradients, dreamy muted color.
name: Quarantine the District
text: Destroy all creatures without a sludge counter on them. Then each opponent rolls a six-sided die; on a 1, they also can't cast spells until their next turn — that district stays sealed. The hazmat tape goes around the whole neighborhood. Your things are already inside it.
flavorText: "Shelter in place" turned out to mean "shelter in the place the thing already is."
